title: Docmost Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the Docmost Helm chart with PostgreSQL, Redis, local storage, and optional S3.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full release name used in resource names

commonLabels.description: Labels added to every resource created by this chart

replicaCount.description: Number of Docmost application replicas. This alpha chart currently supports only 1.

tag.description: Docmost image tag. Defaults to appVersion validated on GitHub Releases and Docker Hub.

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private registries

appUrl.description: Full external URL for Docmost. Auto-detected from the first ingress host when empty.

appSecret.description: Secret key for application security. Auto-generated if empty.

extraEnv.description: Additional environment variables for the Docmost container

database.description: Database selection and external PostgreSQL settings

password.description: External PostgreSQL password. Ignored when existingSecret is set.

existingSecret.description: Existing secret containing the external PostgreSQL password

existingSecretPasswordKey.description: Secret key for the external PostgreSQL password

redis.description: Redis subchart or external Redis configuration

password.description: External Redis password. Ignored when existingSecret is set.

existingSecret.description: Existing secret containing the external Redis password

existingSecretPasswordKey.description: Secret key for the external Redis password

enabled.description: Enable persistent local storage for uploaded files

storageClass.description: Storage class for the Docmost uploads PVC

accessMode.description: Access mode for the Docmost uploads PVC

size.description: Size of the Docmost uploads PVC

existingClaim.description: Existing PVC claim for local uploads storage

annotations.description: Annotations for the Docmost uploads PVC

forcePathStyle.description: Force path-style requests for S3-compatible providers

accessKey.description: S3 access key. Ignored when existingSecret is set.

secretKey.description: S3 secret key. Ignored when existingSecret is set.

existingSecretAccessKeyKey.description: Secret key for the S3 access key in storage.s3.existingSecret

existingSecretSecretKeyKey.description: Secret key for the S3 secret key in storage.s3.existingSecret

backup.description: Built-in backup CronJob for PostgreSQL (pg_dump to S3)

enabled.description: Enable built-in backup CronJob for PostgreSQL (pg_dump to S3)

successfulJobsHistoryLimit.description: Successful job history retained by the CronJob

failedJobsHistoryLimit.description: Failed job history retained by the CronJob

archivePrefix.description: Prefix used in generated backup archive names

images.description: Container images used by the backup CronJob

postgresql.description: PostgreSQL client image used for pg_dump

uploader.description: MinIO client image used for S3 upload

resources.description: Resources applied to the backup dump and upload containers

s3.description: S3-compatible storage settings for backup uploads

prefix.description: Optional key prefix inside the bucket

createBucketIfNotExists.description: Create the bucket automatically when it does not exist yet

existingSecret.description: Existing secret containing access-key and secret-key

existingSecretAccessKeyKey.description: Secret key name for the access key inside backup.s3.existingSecret

existingSecretSecretKeyKey.description: Secret key name for the secret key inside backup.s3.existingSecret

accessKey.description: Inline access key used when backup.s3.existingSecret is not set

secretKey.description: Inline secret key used when backup.s3.existingSecret is not set

type.description: Service type for the Docmost HTTP service

port.description: Service port exposed by the Docmost service

resources.description: CPU and memory requests/limits for the Docmost container

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Grace period for shutdown, in seconds

podLabels.description: Additional labels for the Docmost pod

podAnnotations.description: Additional annotations for the Docmost pod

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for the Docmost container

extraVolumes.description: Additional volumes for the Docmost pod

extraManifests.description: Extra Kubernetes manifests to deploy alongside the chart
